mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO popular_videos (bvid, aid, title, author, author_mid, publish_date, duration, view_count, like_count, coin_count, favorite_count, share_count, danmaku_count, description, cover_url) VALUES
(#{video.bvid}, #{video.aid}, #{video.title}, #{video.author}, #{video.authorMid}, #{video.publishDate}, #{video.duration}, #{video.viewCount}, #{video.likeCount}, #{video.coinCount}, #{video.favoriteCount}, #{video.shareCount}, #{video.danmakuCount}, #{video.description}, #{video.coverUrl})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM popular_videos ORDER BY view_count DESC;
